## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes introduced by this Pull Request.

## Motivation & Context
Why is this change required? What problem does it solve? If it fixes an open issue, link it here (e.g. `Fixes #123`).

## Types of Changes
What types of changes does your code introduce? (Mark 'x' in the checkbox)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (e.g. updating README, adding comments)

## Testing Details
Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.
- **SQL Execution**: Did the queries run successfully in the console?
- **NLP Pipelines**: Did word frequencies and charts render correctly?
- **Console Output**: Did the FastAPI server start without path errors?

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the clean directory structure (Notebooks under `/notebooks`, CSVs under `/data`).
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`README.md` or comments) if required.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.
